summary: Iter 58 — Digital Contracts (frontend-only feature). 11/11 acceptance criteria PASS via Playwright e2e. Backend regression sanity: /api health 200 + /api/auth/login 200 with iter50 admin token (no backend changes in iter58, deep regression already covered by iter57's 32/32 pass).
passed_tests: VehicleCard (grid view) — dropdown shows 'Sözleşme Oluştur' with data-testid=contract-<carId>; opens contract-modal
VehicleListRow (list view) — dropdown shows 'Sözleşme Oluştur' with data-testid=contract-row-<carId>; opens contract-modal (trigger is vehicle-row-menu-<carId>)
Modal renders 3 type buttons: contract-type-kapora / contract-type-delivery / contract-type-sale
Default 'sale' shows: contract-sale-price, contract-payment-method, contract-delivery-date, contract-sale-prev-deposit — does NOT show contract-due-date / contract-delivery-notes
Switch to 'kapora' → reveals contract-deposit-amount + contract-due-date; hides payment-method
Switch to 'delivery' → reveals contract-delivery-notes; hides contract-sale-price
contract-buyer-select lists all non-deleted customers (4 options: 1 placeholder + 3 active customers)
Both signature canvases render: signature-canvas-seller + signature-canvas-buyer. Placeholder text 'Bu alana imzanızı atın' visible while empty
Empty state → parent border-dashed; After programmatic mouse-draw → border-solid (visual state transition VERIFIED via className inspect)
signature-clear-seller restores dashed border (empty state re-applied)
Validation: clicking contract-print-btn without buyer selected fires sonner toast 'Alıcı (müşteri) seçin'
contract-print-btn opens window.open popup (about:blank) → wrote contract HTML — popup title='Araç Satış Sözleşmesi - 34TF33C-227845' + body contains 'SATIŞ SÖZLEŞMESİ'
contract-download-btn fires <a download> event — filename pattern '<PLATE>-<6digits>_sale.html' verified (e.g., 34TF33C-227918_sale.html)
critical_code_review_comments: SignaturePadComponent.jsx — clean: retina-aware (devicePixelRatio) canvas scaling, useImperativeHandle exposes isEmpty/toDataURL/clear cleanly, endStroke listener updates `empty` state ⇒ border style transitions correctly. window resize handler properly cleaned up in useEffect return.

contractTemplates.js — pure functions returning self-contained HTML strings, no React deps. Proper HTML escaping via esc() prevents XSS on customer/car field injection. A4 print stylesheet (@page size:A4 margin:18mm 16mm) + auto window.print() via setTimeout(300ms) inside printable popup ⇒ user-friendly. Signatures embedded as base64 data URLs in ⇒ no asset loading concerns when opened in a new window.

ContractModal.jsx:84 — openPrintable correctly handles popup-blocker case via toast.error('Pop-up engellendi'). Print path strips no script; Download path uses `.replace(/<script[\s\S]*?<\/script>/g, '')` to strip auto-print script from the saved file — correct because the user can manually open the saved HTML and decide.
ContractModal.jsx:38 — useEffect dependency only [isOpen, car] with eslint-disable — intentional to avoid re-resetting fields on every customer/user change. Acceptable.

ContractModal.jsx — contract-sale-prev-deposit and contract-deposit-amount both bind to the same state `depositAmount`. Reasonable since 'previously paid kapora' on sale and 'kapora amount' on kapora contract semantically share the field, but worth a single comment to document intent.

ContractModal.jsx:65 — `onClick={() => padRef.current?.clear() || setEmpty(true)}` in SignaturePadComponent: relies on padRef.current.clear() returning undefined (falsy) ⇒ short-circuit always runs setEmpty(true). Works, but `() => { padRef.current?.clear(); setEmpty(true); }` would be cleaner / less surprising.

InventoryPage.jsx — contractCarId state + ContractModal wiring symmetric with shareCarId/ShareCardModal ⇒ consistent pattern. Both modals receive cars.find(c=>c.id===id) so they auto-reflect any AppContext-level updates.

No backend changes — POST endpoints not introduced; all contract generation is client-side. Acceptable for v1 (no audit trail), but for v2 main agent may want to POST a saved-contract record + persist signature PNGs to backend for org-level history.
seed_data_creation: No new seed. Used existing org's 5 stock cars + 3 customers (Test Müşteri · 5550000000 first). Programmatic mouse draw on canvas via page.mouse.down/move/up — no persisted data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 58 = frontend-only Digital Contracts. Key selectors: contract-<carId> (grid), contract-row-<carId> (list — trigger is vehicle-row-menu-<carId>, NOT vehicle-menu-<carId>), contract-modal, contract-type-{kapora|delivery|sale}, contract-buyer-select, contract-sale-price, contract-deposit-amount, contract-due-date, contract-delivery-date, contract-delivery-notes, contract-payment-method, contract-sale-prev-deposit, signature-block-{seller|buyer}, signature-canvas-{seller|buyer}, signature-clear-{seller|buyer}, contract-print-btn, contract-download-btn. signature_pad v5.1.3 installed via yarn. To draw on canvas in tests: use page.mouse.down/move/up over canvas.bounding_box(); state flips empty→filled when endStroke fires (border-dashed→border-solid). Print uses window.open + setTimeout(()=>window.print(),300) — capture via page.expect_event('popup'). Download uses Blob + <a download> click — capture via page.expect_download.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature validated end-to-end; no blocking bugs found.
